instruction: Please handle the alert update for #launch on discord, look over the alert next step on the board, add only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a short recap when it's done.
canonical_instruction: I need the alert update out to #launch on discord. Please look over what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the alert next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a quick recap once it's handled.
instruction_variants: Can you post the alert update to #launch on discord? Check what's already being tracked on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a recap.
Please get the alert update out to #launch on discord, look over the alert next step on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a recap.
Can you handle the alert update for #launch on discord? Review what's already being tracked on the board, add only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a quick recap.
Please push the alert update to #launch on discord, check whether the alert next step is already on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a short recap.

I need the alert update out to #launch on discord. Please look over what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the alert next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a quick recap once it's handled.

Please get the alert update to #launch on discord, check the alert next step on the board first to see whether it is already there, add only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a recap when it's handled.

The alert update still needs to reach #launch on discord. Please review what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the alert next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a quick recap afterward.

hidden_constraints.value: The escalation is posted and being tracked.

solution_commands: openclaw message send --channel discord --target #launch --message 'Alert escalation started. Please acknowledge.'
email send --to support@example.com --subject 'Alert escalation recap' --body 'The escalation is posted and being tracked.'
